name: Compass, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Company Compass, Inc., d/b/a Compass International Holdings (the Company), was incorporated in Delaware on October 4, 2012 under the name Urban Compass, Inc. The Company has been based in New York City since its incorporation. On January 9, 2026, the Company completed its previously announced acquisition of Anywhere Real Estate Inc.
